'''Gade Yedan''' was [[Gyr Keela]]'s assistant at the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]]. He held Keela in great contempt, feeling that the [[Mrlssi]] was nothing more than bluster and had no ability.

==Biography==
Yedan was involved in the plot to steal the plans for the [[Phantom Project]]'s cloaking device, and the discrediting of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. In this capacity, he reported directly to [[Loka Hask]]. However, Hask shot him shortly before [[Rorax Falken]]'s lab was consumed by a wormhole created by the gravitic polarization beam.

{{Char-stub}}
